name: accordion
description: An accessible disclosure list: each item pairs a question/title trigger with collapsible content. Used by the FAQ recipe; maps to Elementor's native Accordion widget.

items.description: The content field holding {question|title, answer|body} pairs (bound by the compiler).

a11y.contrast: Titles meet 4.5:1; content meets 4.5:1 on the section surface.
notes: Each trigger is a button with aria-expanded and aria-controls linking to its panel (Elementor's widget provides this).
Titles render as h3 so the section outline stays intact.
Collapsed content remains reachable by keyboard via the trigger.

elementor.notes: Compiles to Elementor's Accordion widget; items become the tabs repeater.
